# Found For AI Analytics

> Privacy-friendly web analytics that show how AI assistants
> (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) are recommending your
> business. $49/month with a 7-day free trial. No cookies, no
> setup call, cancel anytime. Includes a monthly DIY AEO
> (Answer Engine Optimization) report.

Found For AI Analytics is a self-serve web analytics product for
small businesses and owner-operators who want to understand how
generative AI assistants describe and recommend them. It is the
self-serve tier of [Found For AI](https://foundforai.com), which
also offers done-for-you AEO services at higher tiers.

## Product

- [Marketing landing page](https://analytics.foundforai.com/): product overview, features, pricing, FAQ.
- [Start free trial](https://buy.stripe.com/8x2eV78Ws36B0yA0WZ3Nm00): 7-day free trial of the $49/month DIY tier via Stripe.
- [Post-checkout welcome](https://analytics.foundforai.com/welcome): page customers see after starting their trial.
- [Log in](https://analytics.foundforai.com/login): existing customers.

## Pricing

- **DIY**: $49/month (or $490/year, 2 months free). 7-day free trial on monthly, 30-day free trial on annual. Self-serve analytics dashboard plus a monthly DIY AEO report.
- **Starter** ($299/month) and **Growth** ($599/month) tiers exist at [foundforai.com/pricing](https://foundforai.com/pricing). Those tiers add a one-time $997 onboarding plus done-for-you AEO work.

## Related products and resources

- [Found For AI main site](https://foundforai.com): the parent brand, where the done-for-you Starter and Growth tiers are sold.
- [Found For AI pricing](https://foundforai.com/pricing): full pricing for all tiers.
- [AI Visibility Scorecard](https://foundforai.com/scorecard): free 5-minute audit tool that scores how well a business is currently surfaced by AI assistants.
- [Book a strategy call](https://foundforai.com/book-call): for businesses interested in the done-for-you tiers.

## Technical

Built on an open-source fork of [Plausible Analytics](https://github.com/plausible/analytics), released under AGPL-3.0. The fork source code is at [github.com/foundforai/foundforai-analytics](https://github.com/foundforai/foundforai-analytics).
